nodes.title: Positive
widgets_values: Create a 360 panoramic image. The rock is centered in the middle of the forest. maintain the same environment and style.

nodes.title: Negative
widgets_values:
lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing finger, extra digits, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, low score, bad score, average score, signature, watermark, username
低分辨率，低画质，肢体畸形，手指畸形，画面过饱和，蜡像感，人脸无细节，过度光滑，画面具有AI感。构图混乱。文字模糊，扭曲

First we Offset the Image by 50&. This this will put any edges in the center of the canvas . 
Next we Calculate a mask to patch via inpainting Stitching. This mask should capture any problem areas . 
Next, Qwen Image edit Remove lora will hel pus remove the visible seam , but we need to help it out by giving it an object to remove. So we take the bare mask , shink it slightly and super impose that onto the image. 
Once the image is seamless, we reset the image orientation by adding another 50% offset node

In this portion fof the graph we pad the image to support equirectangular dimensions ( 2:1) . Once the image is padded we Fill in the grey areas with a new image. This is known as out painting . We need to insure that our image will map properly on a dome so it needs to be in equirectangular perspective. We achive this by outpainting with a finetuned lora by MikMumpitz.
